welcome: Hello! I am Maria. How can I help you today?
chatInputPlaceholder: What can Maria help you with today?
professionalAsst: Maria is an AI, and can make mistakes
saveHistoryDesc: Save your chat data locally for easier access.
confirmDeleteHistory: Delete all conversation history? This cannot be undone.
customInstPlaceholder: Tell Maria how you want her to respond...
autoMemoryDesc: Allow Maria to automatically save important details from your conversations for more personalized responses.
aboutMemoryDesc: Maria uses information she learns about you (like name, preferences) to improve chats. Data stays on your device.
topicsDesc: Maria will notify you if there is new relevant information based on topics you follow.
limitDesc: Upgrade to Maria Plus for higher limits, or wait

notifications_settings.group_chat_desc: You will receive notifications for new messages from group chats.
notifications_settings.usage_desc: We will notify you when limits are reset for features like image generation.
notifications_settings.project_desc: Get notified when you receive email invitations to shared projects.
notifications_settings.recommendation_desc: Get the latest news about tools, tips, and new features from Maria.
notifications_settings.response_desc: Get notifications when Maria responds to requests that take time, such as research or image generation.
notifications_settings.tasks_desc: Receive notifications when tasks you've created have updates.

personalization_settings.style_tone_desc: Set Maria's speaking style and tone when responding to you. This does not affect Maria's abilities.
personalization_settings.quick_answer_desc: Maria can sometimes use her general knowledge to provide quick and deep answers. These answers are not personalized and do not use your memory.
personalization_settings.bio_placeholder: Interests, values, or preferences to be remembered
personalization_settings.use_memory_desc: Allow Maria to store and use memory when responding.
personalization_settings.use_history_desc: Allow Maria to refer to recent conversations when responding.
personalization_settings.web_search_desc: Allow Maria to search the web automatically for answers.

automation.title: Maria Intelligent Automation
automation.desc: Maria will automatically manage your schedule and activities based on your habits.
automation.smart_active_desc: Maria will recognize when you start work or go home and perform appropriate actions automatically.
